  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

X70 ECAS2

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 02
Func Name: Suspension pilotée

  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "Identification",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Date de fabrication -aa,mm,jj-": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° Après vente": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° de  calibration": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° ITG": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° RENAULT du calculateur": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° révision": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },
      "N° version du software": {
